title: Sales Executive /Senior Sales Executive
description:
• Basic Salary + Commissions + Incentives + Allowances

  • Annual Package: $80K+-

  • Career Advancement (Assistant Manager)

 Are you looking for a dynamic, rewarding, and future-ready career?

Do you want to be part of a passionate team that’s committed to enhancing lives through innovative wellness solutions and products?

Come join us at novita as a Sales Executive/ Senior Sales Executive, and play a key role in delivering meaningful value to modern households!

We’re on the lookout for energetic and driven individuals who are eager to grow with us.

No experience? No problem! We provide full training, guidance, and the support you need to thrive and succeed!

What You’ll Do

  1. Be a game-changer: Identify and pursue new sales opportunities across retail channels

  2. Tell the story: Promote & introduce the Total Wellness perspective in Air.Water.Body with Relevant and optimized for smart performance, novita products

  3. Build your Team: Forge long-term relationships with our Sales Promoters, Channel Business Partners & Customers

  4. Own your role: Manage the full sales cycle of operational activities & tasks and execute company’s sales directives

  5. Learn every day: Stay on top latest of products and market trend

 What You’ll Get

  1. Real responsibility  — you’ll own your sales territory and be treated like a pro.

  2. A solid training program and experienced mentors to guide your growth.

  3. Exposure to projects, events & activities across of different sales nature

  4. Supportive, collaborative, and driven team.

  5. A chance to shape your career in home appliances retail industry that’s more exciting than you think.

 What we’re Looking For

  1. Great communication and relationship-building skills.

  2. A goal-getter mindset: proactive, positive, and ready to roll.

  3. Multi-tasker that thrives on challenges

  4. A team player willing to learn, progress and contribute.

  • Working Location -  North

  • Transport MRT Pick-up provided

  • Working hrs / day - 8.45am to 6.00pm (Mon - Fri), 8.45am to 1.00pm (1st sat of the month)

We are committed to provide opportunity for career advancement and offer attractive salary that commensurate with work experience. Interested candidates, please send in your resume and cover letter via APPLY NOW. We apologize that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
novita is a proud homegrown Singapore brand that was launched under the spearhead of 9 Koi Marketing Pte Ltd since 1999. With humble beginnings, novita started off with humidifiers as its first product range and has steadily expanded to include many more innovative products.


Capitalizing on our extensive distribution network, excellent customer service and friendly after-sales support, we have progressively improved and grown to reach out and satisfy many customers. At the heart of novita are our core values and our belief in continuation.


Key to our brand name stands our greatest asset, which is our drive for continuous innovation. This coupled with our continuous progression of learning has enabled us to always seek and bring unique solutions to the daily household woes of our customers.
postedCompany.name: 9 KOI MARKETING PTE LTD
